prompt: A surreal but physically plausible architectural scene showing two separate staircases on either side, each clearly ascending upward when viewed individually, with people walking up both staircases successfully, but in the center where the two staircases merge into one unified structure, the combined staircase subtly slopes downward, creating a visual contradiction, realistic materials like stone and concrete, soft natural lighting, cinematic composition, no text, no symbols, no diagrams, no labels, highly detailed, looks like real-world architecture
